## What

<!-- Describe what changed and why. Keep it concise. -->

## Why

<!-- What problem does this solve? Link issues if applicable: Closes #123 -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructuring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance, config, dependencies
- [ ] `test` — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD pipeline changes
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] Code compiles without errors
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] `README.md` updated (if setup, features, or config changed)
- [ ] `appsettings.example.json` updated (if new config keys added)
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data in committed files
- [ ] Tested locally
